name: milhouse-skills
description: Skills for the Milhouse autonomous agent system: generate PRDs and convert them to prd.json for autonomous execution.

interface.shortDescription: Generate PRDs and convert them for Milhouse runs.
interface.longDescription: Milhouse provides Codex-compatible skills for creating Product Requirements Documents and converting them into prd.json user stories for autonomous agent-loop execution.
defaultPrompt: Create a PRD for this feature.
Convert this PRD to Milhouse format.
